prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为3514→3822→3881→2644→2817，2021–2023年持续后移（从3514后移至3881），2024年大幅前移至2644（创近年最佳），2025年 小幅后移至2817；近两年位次在2600–2800区间波动，2025年基准约2817名；2021–2025年物理类招生计划分别为132→134→137→136→138人，呈小幅递增趋势；202 6年计划123人，较2025年减少15人（约-10.9%），为近年首次明显缩招，理论上使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名 2026年第20名（近年稳定在20–22名），稳居全国顶尖工科院校行列，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及PPT贬低其他专业及考试作弊回 应不当等事件，但整体影响有限；抖音热度排名第66位（一般），短视频曝光量中等；2021–2025年均无投档线断档记录，报考热度平稳；第五轮学科评估A-及 以上共20个学科，其中化学工程与技术、管理科学与工程为A+，仪器科学与技术、光学工程、动力工程及工程热物理、土木工程、建筑学、机械工程、水利工程等均为A级，工科 实力极为突出，对物理类考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与天津大学优势工科方向高度契合；福 建省物理类考生数从2021年11.7万持续增长至2025年19.2万，2026年估算约20.4万人（较2025年增约6.1%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；天津大学位于天津市，非本省高校；福建省考生对北方高校存在一定地域偏好差异，但天大作为顶尖985，跨省吸引力不受明显影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准281 7名、2026年缩招约10.9%（使位次前移约184名至2633）及福建省物理类考生增加约6.1%（使位次后移），两者对冲后预计位次在2633基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约2683名， 区间2361–3005名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 3514 → 3822 → 3881 → 2644 → 2817. Rankings continuously declined from 2021 to 2023 (from 3514 to 3881), then significantly improved in 2024 to 2644 (a recent best), and slightly declined in 2025 to 2817. In the past two years, rankings fluctuated within the 2600–2800 range, with a baseline of approximately 2817 in 2025. Enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 132 → 134 → 137 → 136 → 138, showing a slight increasing trend. The 2026 plan is 123, a decrease of 15 (about -10.9%) compared to 2025, marking the first significant reduction in recent years, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 20th (stable at 20–22 in recent years), firmly among the top engineering institutions in the country, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring students. In 2026, reputation evaluations were somewhat negative, involving incidents such as PPT disparaging other majors and improper responses to exam cheating, but the overall impact is limited. Douyin popularity ranking is 66th (average), with moderate short video exposure. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of admission cutoff line breaks, indicating stable application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there were 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chemical Engineering and Technology, and Management Science and Engineering as A+, and Instrument Science and Technology, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Mechanical Engineering, and Water Resources Engineering as A-level, showcasing outstanding engineering strength and strong appeal to Physics Category applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, aligning well with Tianjin University's advantageous engineering fields. The number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province has grown from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, with an estimated 204,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 6.1% from 2025), intensifying competition due to the expanding candidate pool. Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, not a local university in Fujian. There is some regional preference difference among Fujian candidates towards northern universities, but as a top 985 university, Tianjin University's cross-provincial appeal is not significantly affected.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline of 2817, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 10.9% (which would move the ranking forward by about 184 to 2633), and the increase in Fujian Physics Category examinees by about 6.1% (which would move the ranking backward), the two factors offset each other, resulting in a slight backward shift from 2633. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2683, with a range of 2361–3005.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Engineering Experimental Class (01 National Future Technology College)
- Engineering Experimental Class (04 National Characteristic Demonstration Software College Intelligent and Computing Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (03 Electrical and Information Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (02 National New Engineering Education Innovation Center)
- Engineering Experimental Class (06 National Demonstration Microelectronics College Integrated Circuit Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (05 National Pilot College Precision Instrument and Optoelectronic Information Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (07 Intelligent Equipment Design and Manufacturing)
- Engineering Experimental Class (08 High-Tech Ship and Marine Equipment Intelligent Design and Management)
- Engineering Experimental Class (09 Intelligent Water Resources).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2361–3005, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Electrical and Information Class, Intelligent and Computing Class, Precision Instrument and Optoelectronic Information Class) as the main direction. Tier 1 Future Technology College and Intelligent and Computing Class can be targeted as reach options, while Tier 3 Intelligent Equipment Design and Manufacturing and Intelligent Water Resources can serve as safety choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<2361), prioritize reaching for the Future Technology College and the flagship Intelligent and Computing Class.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准1631名、2026年历史类大幅扩招180%（使位次后移至约3393）及福建省历史类考生规模基本稳定，预 计最低位次约3343名，区间2942–3744名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum rankings for History Category in 2024–2025 were 1354→1631 respectively, with 2025 shifting back by about 277 places compared to 2024, showing a backward trend, with a baseline of about 1631 in 2025; the enrollment plan for History Category in 2024–2025 was 5 students (only 1 major: Architecture); in 2026, the plan significantly increased to 14 students (+180%), adding 10 students for Social Science Experimental Class (New Liberal Arts and New Engineering Integration Innovation Class) and 4 for Architecture, with a notable increase in major choices, and the expansion magnitude is extremely large, theoretically greatly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, ranked 20th in Soft Science 2026; the university level also has strong appeal for History Category candidates; reputation in 2026 is slightly negative but with limited impact; Douyin popularity is average; no record of enrollment gaps; Architecture rated A, Urban and Rural Planning A, Landscape Architecture A-, highly matching the History Category enrollment major Architecture.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The number of History Category candidates in Fujian Province fluctuated from 78,000 in 2021 to 60,000 in 2025, estimated at about 64,000 in 2026, with a relatively stable candidate scale; the 180% expansion is the most important factor affecting rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline of 1631, the significant 180% expansion in History Category in 2026 (shifting rankings back to about 3393), and the basically stable scale of History Category candidates in Fujian Province, the estimated minimum ranking is about 3343, with a range of 2942–3744.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Architecture (Future Smart Human Settlement Outstanding Talent Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (New Liberal Arts and New Engineering Integration Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History Category has only 2 enrollment majors. With rankings within the predicted range of 2942–3744, Architecture (Tier 1) requires higher rankings, while Social Science Experimental Class (Tier 3) is relatively easier to enter; if rankings are significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can aim for Architecture; if rankings are close to the upper limit of the range, it is recommended to focus on Social Science Experimental Class.
